{% for test_case in test_cases %}

{{test_case.name}}

{{test_case.description}}

Directory: {{test_case.work_dir}}
{% for outcome in test_case.test_outcomes %} {% if not outcome.passed %}

Test {{loop.index}}: {{outcome.name}}

{% if outcome.command_outcome %}

Command arguments


                        {% for arg in outcome.command_outcome.arguments %}
                            {{- arg }}
                        {% endfor -%}

{% if outcome.command_outcome.success %} ✔️ {% else %} ❌ {% endif %} Exit code: {{outcome.command_outcome.exit_code}}

{% if outcome.command_outcome.stdout %}

stdout

                                {{outcome.command_outcome.stdout}}

{% endif %} {% if outcome.command_outcome.stderr %}

stderr

                                {{outcome.command_outcome.stderr}}

{% endif %}
{% endif %} {% set expectations_outcome = outcome.expectations_outcome %} {% if expectations_outcome.files_remaining_after_previous %}

Files remaining after previous test

    {% for file in expectations_outcome.files_remaining_after_previous %}
  1. {{file}}
    2. {% endfor %}
{% endif %}

Expectations

    {% for outcome in expectations_outcome.outcomes %}
  1. {{outcome}}
    2. {% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% endfor %}
{% endfor %}
